results.name: lorwyn
results.description: An idyllic world based on Celtic folklore and mythology.

results.name: lorwyn/shadowmoor
results.description: A dual plane where day and night coexist concurrently; the day never ends in Lorwyn, and the sun never rises upon Shadowmoor.

results.name: lose trigger
results.description: Cards that trigger when an opponent loses the game (as opposed a replacement effect for yourself).

results.name: lots of legs
results.description: Creatures with more than the usual two legs.

results.name: lotus
results.description: A type of flower, associated with mana since Alpha

results.name: lotus position
results.description: Legs folded, feet resting on top of the knees; a traditional meditation pose. If the feet are beneath the knees, it's [criss-cross applesauce](criss-cross-apple-sauce).

results.name: love
results.description: Visible expressions of love between characters. Also important: [hug](/tags/artwork/hug), [holding hands](/tags/artwork/holding-hands), [romantic couple](/tags/artwork/romantic-couple), [kiss](/tags/artwork/kiss)

results.name: loxodon
results.description: Elephant-like humanoids found throughout the multiverse.

results.name: lucas bishop
results.description: From Marvel Comics, an X-man better known as Red Bishop.

results.name: lunar eclipse
results.description: When the moon falls into the earth's shadow. (Not a solar eclipse.)

results.name: lunar phases
results.description: Cards depicting multiple lunar phases, usually in sequence.

results.name: lure
results.description: All creatures able to block this creature must do so. See also [lure-limited](lure-limited) and [provoke lite](provoke-lite).

results.name: lure-limited
results.description: This creature must be blocked, but not necessarily by all creatures like a true lure.

results.name: lurking evil
results.description: Duskmourn card variants with hidden monsters in the background of the art

results.name: maag taranau
results.description: The Fomori Vault located on Thunder Junction.

results.name: mace
results.description: A club weapon with a heavy weight on the end for blunt strikes. When the head is instead a ball with large spikes, that's a [morning star].
